title: HP’s Smart Tank 5101 drops to $170 for back-to-school — and includes 2 years of ink free in the box
summary: The pitch for tank printers like the HP Smart Tank 5101 is straightforward: instead of buying ink cartridges that run out every few hundred pages, you refill four visible ink tanks from bottles, and each bottle lasts dramatically longer.
